# Commercial Lending Policy

Internal policy governing all commercial and SME lending decisions.
Version 2025.1, effective 1 March 2025.

## Hard stops

- Bureau score below 30: automatic decline
- CCJ total value above 50,000: automatic decline
- Accounts older than 18 months: automatic decline
- DSCR below 1.0: automatic decline
- LTV above 85%: automatic decline (any property type)
- Development site LTV above 65%: automatic decline

## Pricing framework

Base rate is determined by a pricing tier (A through E), then adjusted
for special conditions (environmental risk, sector loadings, personal
guarantee discounts). Each adjustment is additive. The sum of all
adjustments is capped at +3.00% above base to prevent excessive loading.

## Regulatory alignment

- FCA Senior Manager Certification Regime (SMCR)
- PRA Rulebook: Credit Risk (CRR Article 178)
- Basel III standardised approach for commercial real estate
